season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Sweet potato grows well in warm climates with loose soils, moderate fertility, and regular moisture.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Widely suitable for South Indian garden lands and light-textured soils.

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
micronutrients: Boron if root cracking or deficiency is observed

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Ensure ridges are well drained to prevent tuber rot.
season_advice.dry_season: Irrigate lightly but regularly during tuber bulking.
season_advice.winter_season: Mild winter allows good tuber development in frost-free regions.

application_section.title: Application Method
application_section.frequency: At planting and 30 days after planting

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Maintain even moisture during tuber formation

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Avoid excess nitrogen that promotes vine growth over tubers
Do not let ridges collapse in heavy rain

events.activity: Vine planting and basal manure application
